Class SupporterConfiguration<FeatureID extends Enum<?>, Price, FeatureMeta>

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.supporter.configuration.SupporterConfiguration<FeatureID, Price, FeatureMeta>
Type Parameters:
FeatureID - The enum type representing the features.
Price - The type representing the price of a feature.
FeatureMeta - The type representing additional metadata for a feature.
public class SupporterConfiguration<FeatureID extends Enum<?>, Price, FeatureMeta> extends Object
Configuration for the supporter module. This class holds the definition of subscriptions, features and interaction based access rules.

    • byId

      public Optional<Subscription> byId(long id)
      Finds a subscription by its id.
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the subscription.
      Returns:
      An optional containing the subscription if found.

    • findSubscription

      public Optional<Subscription> findSubscription(Platform platform, PurchaseType type, String id)
      Finds a subscription by platform, type and platform specific id.
      Parameters:
      platform - The platform.
      type - The purchase type.
      id - The platform specific id.
      Returns:
      An optional containing the subscription if found.
